introSection: Abyss is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure World in Bibra Lake, Western Australia, Australia. Opened in 2013, it is a custom Euro-Fighter installation from Gerstlauer.
fullText: Abyss is a steel roller coaster located at Adventure World in Bibra Lake, Western Australia, Australia. Opened in 2013, it is a custom Euro-Fighter installation from Gerstlauer.
